description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and slightly rounded at the edges. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, providing a uniform and contemporary appearance. The upholstery is smooth and appears to be made of a synthetic leather or vinyl material, giving it a subtle sheen. The sofa is supported by four short, block-style legs that are minimally visible, suggesting a low-profile design. The overall color is a uniform medium gray, contributing to its modern and versatile aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, smooth upholstery, and plush seat and back cushions. The design is sleek and boxy, supported by short, block-style legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two matching back cushions, and straight, boxy armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uniform height of the armrest and backrest, as well as the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's rectangular profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and backrest alignment, emphasizing the sofa's symmetry.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all loose and rectangular, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a flat profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose back cushions, continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
